title: Replace Enterprise or Domain Admin account for Entra Connect AD DS Connector account
remediation:
1. Review the exposed account and their group memberships. The list contains members of Domain/Enterprise Admins through direct and recursive membership.
2. Perform one of the following actions:

a. Remove the user from privileged groups, ensuring it retains the necessary permissions to function as the Entra Connect Connector account.
b. Change the Entra Connect AD DS Connector account.
remediationImpact: According to Entra best practice, starting with build 1.4.###.#, Enterprise Admin and Domain Admin accounts can no longer be used as the AD DS Connector account to improve security. Go to the Accounts used for Microsoft Entra connect for more details. This prevents over-privileging the connector account, reducing the risk of domain-wide compromise if the account is attacked. Users must now create or assign a lower-privileged account specifically for directory synchronization, ensuring better adherence to the principle of least privilege and protecting critical admin accounts.
